name: Zhishu Agent - 智能医疗就诊规划系统
description: 帮助用户完成从症状到就医行程单的全流程就医规划

skills.name: healthpath-intent-understanding
skills.description: 解析用户自然语言输入，提取结构化就医意图

skills.name: healthpath-symptom-triage
skills.description: 根据症状推荐科室并识别危急信号

skills.name: healthpath-hospital-matcher
skills.description: 按位置和科室匹配附近医院候选

skills.name: healthpath-registration-fetcher
skills.description: 获取医院官网/挂号链接信息

skills.name: healthpath-itinerary-builder
skills.description: 规划路线并生成就医行程单 PDF

steps.description: 路线规划与 PDF 生成
